title: [codereview-pass1] P4: Add comprehensive rustdoc comments and cross-references to CCP vectors in lichen-rpl/src/lib.rs
description: The updated module doc mentions vectors but public fns hash_32, compute_rendezvous_channel, CoordinationMechanism lack /// docs and links to ccp_load_balancing.json or ccp16-desync.json. Also update spec/appendix-rpl.md and draft-lichen-rpl-lora-00.md for consistency per CCP-16. Label codereview. Fix all P4 style/docs.
